C#
Copy
public static IDisposable Subscribe<T>(
	this IAsyncEvent<IBulkEntityProcessingContext<T>> asyncEvent,
	Func<IBulkEntityProcessingContext<T>, Task> func,
	string name = null
)
where T : ITypedEntityWrapper

Parameters

asyncEvent
Type: QBM.CompositionApi.ApiManagerIAsyncEventIBulkEntityProcessingContextT
func
Type: SystemFuncIBulkEntityProcessingContextT, Task
name (Optional)
Type: SystemString

Type Parameters

T

Return Value

Type: IDisposable

Usage Note

In Visual Basic and C#, you can call this method as an instance method on any object of type IAsyncEventIBulkEntityProcessingContextT. When you use instance method syntax to call this method, omit the first parameter. For more information, see Extension Methods (Visual Basic) or Extension Methods (C# Programming Guide).
